center.name: 羅芒島
center.summary: 羅芒島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Azure kingfisher，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The azure kingfisher is found in northern and eastern Australia and Tasmania, as well as the lowlands of New Guinea and neighbouring islands, and out to North Maluku and Romang

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The azure kingfisher is found in northern and eastern Australia and Tasmania, as well as the lowlands of New Guinea and neighbouring islands, and out to North Maluku and Romang
